# notInteractive

**Type Property**

Displaying the required authentication user interface is forbidden.

## Declaration

```swift
static var notInteractive: LAError.Code { get }
```

## Discussion

Permit the display of the authentication UI by setting the [doc://com.apple.localauthentication/documentation/LocalAuthentication/LAContext/interactionNotAllowed] property to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Error Codes

- **appCancel**: The app canceled authentication.
- **systemCancel**: The system canceled authentication.
- **userCancel**: The user tapped the cancel button in the authentication dialog.
- **biometryDisconnected**: The device supports biometry only using a removable accessory, but the paired accessory isn’t connected.
- **biometryLockout**: Biometry is locked because there were too many failed attempts.
- **biometryNotAvailable**: Biometry is not available on the device.
- **biometryNotEnrolled**: The user has no enrolled biometric identities.
- **biometryNotPaired**: The device supports biometry only using a removable accessory, but no accessory is paired.
- **touchIDLockout**: Touch ID is locked because there were too many failed attempts.
- **touchIDNotAvailable**: Touch ID is not available on the device.
- **touchIDNotEnrolled**: The user has no enrolled Touch ID fingers.
- **authenticationFailed**: The user failed to provide valid credentials.
- **invalidContext**: The context was previously invalidated.
- **invalidDimensions**
- **passcodeNotSet**: A passcode isn’t set on the device.
